preMeeting.title: Early Advancement Extra
preMeeting.description: Patrick will be at Northwoods starting at 1:30 to work with any scout, 8th grade or above, who would like to catch-up on 2nd Class or 1st Class requirements. Text Patrick (414-915-6423) if you plan to arrive early.

agenda.title: Flag Ceremony and Messages
agenda.description: Opening flag ceremony and weekly announcements.

agenda.title: Patrol Meetings
agenda.description: Patrol members will meet with their patrol leader to discuss and vote on the project the Troop will build as part of the upcoming Woodworking Merit Badge. The PLs will report the votes to the SPL.

agenda.title: Troop Project
agenda.description: The troop will head up to the 3rd floor to spend 15 minutes getting the room ready for Woodworking MB in April. There are tarps to fold and some stuff to move.

agenda.title: Tot'n Chip / Open Advancement
agenda.description: Scouts who have not yet attended Summer Camp will earn their Tot'n Chip Award so they are ready to participate in Woodworking Merit Badge. Scouts not doing Tot'n Chip will work on Tenderfoot, 2nd Class and 1st Class requirements.

agenda.title: Citizenship in the World
agenda.description: Older scouts completed requirement 6 with Nina Bendre last week. These scouts will report on their progress on requirement 7.

requirements.text: Do Two of The Following: (a) Visit the Web site of the U.S. State Department. (b) Visit the Web site of an international news organization or foreign government. (c) Visit with a student or Scout from another country. (d) Attend a world Scout jamboree. (e) Participate in or attend an international event in your area.
requirements.source: Citizenship in the World MB, Requirement 7

agenda.title: OA Elections
agenda.description: Order of the Arrow elections. Eligible scouts: Finn P., Hazel S., Jack P., Oliver V.

agenda.title: Patrol Leader Elections
agenda.description: Each patrol will elect its patrol leader and decide if they want to keep their patrol name or change it.

agenda.title: Open Advancement
agenda.description: Younger scouts work on Tenderfoot, 2nd Class and 1st Class requirements.

agenda.title: Citizenship in the World
agenda.description: Older scouts work on requirement 6 with Nina Bendre.

preMeeting.title: PLC Meeting
preMeeting.description: Patrol Leader Council meets to plan activities and themes through the end of summer.

agenda.title: Aluminum Can Drive
agenda.description: Bring your aluminum cans to the loading dock before the meeting.

agenda.title: Open Advancement
agenda.description: Younger scouts work on Tenderfoot, 2nd Class and 1st Class requirements.

agenda.title: Citizenship in the World
agenda.description: Older scouts work on requirement 4c. Bring a brief report on two international organizations.

lookAhead.title: Outing
lookAhead.note: Five Mile Compass Hike / Bike Hike
